title: T-017 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/pause endpoint + auto downtime stub
prompt:
# T-017 — POST /work-orders/:id/pause endpoint

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.1 FR-08-E1-002, §7.4 FR-08-E4-001, §8.2.1, §10.1

## Goal
Implement POST /api/production/work-orders/[id]/pause performing IN_PROGRESS→PAUSED with side-effect open_downtime_event (source='wo_pause', category_required=true) per §10.1.

## Implementation contract
App Router POST handler. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, reason_category_id: uuid, notes?: string}. withIdempotency wrap. Single DB transaction: assert WO.status='IN_PROGRESS' (else 409), UPDATE work_orders.status='PAUSED', INSERT downtime_events row (source='wo_pause', wo_id=:id, category_id=reason_category_id, started_at=now, ended_at=NULL, recorded_by=operator_id). Return 200 {wo_id, status:'PAUSED', downtime_event_id, paused_at}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/pause/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/pause/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/pause-wo.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO status=IN_PROGRESS, when POST /pause with valid body, then 200 status=PAUSED, downtime_events row inserted with source='wo_pause' and ended_at NULL
2. Given WO status=PAUSED, when POST /pause called, then 409 Conflict invalid_state_transition
3. Given missing reason_category_id, when POST /pause, then 422 ValidationError listing reason_category_id (V-PROD-22 + §10.1 category_required)

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + 422 missing category before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*pause'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow PAUSE without category (V-PROD-22)
- Do not split UPDATE+INSERT across transactions
- Do not skip idempotency

pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic transaction: state transition IN_PROGRESS→PAUSED + downtime_events row insert with source='wo_pause'. category_required enforced at zod layer. wo_id linked (V-PROD-22 ensured by route since source='wo_pause' always has wo_id present).
out_of_scope: Do not implement manual downtime entry endpoint (T-039)
Do not implement outbox emit (T-041 wires)
acceptance_criteria: Given WO IN_PROGRESS, when POST /pause valid, then 200 PAUSED + downtime_events row inserted source='wo_pause' ended_at NULL
Given WO PAUSED, when POST /pause, then 409 invalid_state_transition
Given missing reason_category_id, when POST /pause, then 422 listing reason_category_id
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting happy + 409 + 422 before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow PAUSE without category
Do not split state+downtime across two transactions
